rag_rules: Use AGREE syntax: assume/guarantee for properties, eq for equations, const for constants, and assign for assignments
Use temporal recurrence for stateful equations and nested if-then-else for branching logic
Place component type contracts in type scopes and implementation contracts in implementation scopes
Use visible identifiers for inputs and outputs in component type contracts
Write output dependency guarantees that relate visible outputs to visible inputs
generic_rules: Use concrete bounds, named constants, or visible relations for assumptions and guarantees
Avoid implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts
Use AGREE scalar types: int, real, and bool
Do not encode AADL properties as AGREE expressions unless exposed as ports or constants
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use AGREE logical operators: and, or, not, =>
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use nested if-then-else for branching logic
anti_patterns: Avoid using AADL property names directly in AGREE expressions
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts
Do not use invalid AGREE scalar type names like integer or boolean
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names are not AGREE variables
AGREE scalar type names are int, real, and bool
